workspace_description: campaign-command — lambda architecture. Batch ad analytics + real-time social sentiment + exec chatbot for campaign ROI optimization.

cc_raw_lakehouse.description: Raw batch data from Analytics and AdWords APIs

cc_gold_warehouse.description: Curated gold layer for ROI reporting and regional metrics

cc_stream_eventhouse.description: Real-time social sentiment and influencer content

cc_stream_kqldb.description: KQL Database within Eventhouse for stream queries

cc_spark_environment.description: Spark/Python runtime for batch transform notebooks

cc_batch_pipeline.description: Orchestrate batch ingestion from Analytics + AdWords APIs

cc_social_eventstream.description: Ingest real-time social media sentiment feeds

cc_transform_nb.description: Batch transforms, sentiment scoring, regional aggregation

cc_stream_kql.description: Real-time stream aggregations on social data

cc_campaign_sem.description: Unified campaign model for ROI reporting + Data Agent

cc_roi_report.description: Interactive ROI and regional ad performance reports

cc_campaign_agent.description: Internal exec chatbot for self-service campaign Q&A

cc_alerts_activator.description: ROI threshold alerts for regional ad buy decisions
